title: zephyranthes guachipensis
intro: Zephyranthes guachipensis, also known as Guachipelin or Guachipelin Lily, is a type of flowering plant native to Central America. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Zephyranthes guachipensis include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Zephyranthes guachipensis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves or flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
